title: SetError.server_retry_after has skip_serializing_if on a deserialize-only type
description: SetError is only ever deserialized from server responses, never serialized. The #[serde(skip_serializing_if = "Option::is_none")] attribute on server_retry_after has zero effect on deserialization. The attribute is factually wrong and misleads readers into thinking SetError participates in serialization. Option<T> fields are already None when absent in JSON without any annotation. Fix: remove the skip_serializing_if line entirely. Optionally add #[serde(default)] for explicitness, though serde already defaults Option to None.
